title: Mireille Coppersmith

summary: Founder of Inkwhale Co.

Mireille Coppersmith is the founder of Inkwhale Co. Mireille pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Inkwhale Co
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Mireille Coppersmith.
---

Inkwhale Co is a seed-stage company. Founded by Mireille Coppersmith. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Inkwhale Co call with Mireille Coppersmith.
Mireille prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
I committed to sending Mireille the diligence checklist by Friday.
Mireille is worried the Inkwhale Co pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
